title: 抽离 Workbench Command 配置
goal: 把主工作台的 command menu 配置从 DecisionWorkbench 中抽离为专用 hook，降低主组件复杂度，并保持命令标题、分组、快捷键、禁用逻辑和执行行为不变。
scope: 迁移 command list 和 command factory
DecisionWorkbench 继续持有 mode、action、diff 和业务状态，只向 hook 传入状态与回调
保留现有命令 id、title、group、detail、shortcut、disabled 和 disabledReason
记录中文规格、执行计划和任务日志
out_of_scope: 重做 CommandMenu 视觉设计
改变快捷键、ARIA 语义、筛选逻辑或焦点恢复行为
调整业务 API、数据库模型或 E2E 语义
verification: test -f apps/web/components/command-menu/use-workbench-commands.ts -> failed before implementation, confirming missing hook boundary
rg -n "const commandItems = useMemo|function command\\(" apps/web/components/decision-workbench.tsx -> found old inline command configuration before implementation

rg -n "const commandItems = useMemo|function command\\(|CommandMenuItem" apps/web/components/decision-workbench.tsx apps/web/components/command-menu/use-workbench-commands.ts -> command factory and CommandMenuItem only in new hook
cd apps/web && npm run typecheck -> passed
cd apps/web && npm run build -> passed
cd apps/api && uv run pytest -> 90 passed
